title: Refactor: Extract duplicate theme extraction logic in orchestrator
body:
## Summary

The orchestrator has two near-identical blocks for theme extraction logic that should be consolidated into a helper method.

## Locations

- `internal/usecase/review/orchestrator.go` lines ~565-600 (branch review path)
- `internal/usecase/review/orchestrator.go` lines ~1084-1120 (PR review path)

## Current State

Both blocks:
1. Call `ThemeExtractor.ExtractThemes()`
2. Handle errors with warning log
3. Set `projectContext.ThemeContext` and deprecated `ExtractedThemes`
4. Log extraction results

## Proposed Solution

Extract a helper method:

```go
func (o *Orchestrator) enrichWithThemeContext(
    ctx context.Context,
    triageCtx *triage.Context,
    projectContext *ProjectContext,
) {
    // Consolidated theme extraction logic
}
```

## Why This Matters

- DRY violation increases maintenance cost
- Risk of divergence if one block gets updated and the other doesn't
- Future changes (e.g., new logging fields) must be applied twice

## Origin

Identified during PR #243 code review (finding `d0e34b0ebacfcc9b4c4e4bef3c88a9ff`).
